connection.summary: Max_used_connections is high relative to max_connections
connection.suggestion: Increase max_connections or implement connection pooling

query_cache.summary: Query cache is deprecated in MySQL 8.0 and removed in 8.3+
query_cache.suggestion: Set query_cache_type = OFF and rely on application-level caching (Redis, Memcached)

query_cache.summary: Query cache is still allocated despite being deprecated

innodb.summary: InnoDB buffer pool size may be too small for modern workloads
innodb.suggestion: Set innodb_buffer_pool_size to at least 1GB or 70% of available RAM

innodb.summary: InnoDB redo log size is small
innodb.suggestion: Set innodb_log_file_size to at least 512MB for write-heavy workloads

innodb.summary: InnoDB flush method may need review
innodb.suggestion: Consider O_DIRECT (Linux) or O_DIRECT_NO_FSYNC for better performance

innodb.summary: InnoDB I/O capacity may be low for SSD storage
innodb.suggestion: Set innodb_io_capacity = 2000 and innodb_io_capacity_max = 4000 for SSD
Set innodb_autoinc_lock_mode = 2 for better concurrency with mixed-mode inserts

replication.suggestion: Enable gtid_mode = ON for easier replication management and failover
